languages.text: "Освоились. Технические туннели не сильно отличаются от корней Заркова. С вашими слугами мои бойцы настороже, но здесь вроде так у всех общин принято. Было пару стычек с местными, но пока обошлись только разбитыми носами да парой сломанных ног".

"They're settling in well. The technical corridors aren't much different from Zarkov's roots. My soldiers are on their guard around your servants, but that seems to be the way for every community here. We've had a few scuffles with the locals, but so far it's just been bloody noses and a couple of broken legs."
languages.original_text: "Освоились. Технические туннели не сильно отличаются от корней Заркова. С вашими слугами мои бойцы настороже, но здесь вроде так у всех общин принято. Было пару стычек с местными, но пока обошлись только разбитыми носами да парой сломанных ног".

traits.locale_text: "They have settled in well. The technical tunnels aren't much different from Zarkov's roots. My men are on their guard around your servants, but that seems to be the way for every community here. We've had a few scuffles with the locals, but so far it's just been bloody noses and a couple of broken legs."

"They're settling in well. The technical corridors aren't much different from Zarkov's roots. My soldiers are on their guard around your servants, but that seems to be the way for every community here. We've had a few scuffles with the locals, but so far it's just been bloody noses and a couple of broken legs."

"They have settled in well, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The voidship is our new Zarkov. And we are learning how to survive in this world. We're exploring the maintenance tunnels, and asking about behaviour in various incidents and boarding. The next step is to learn how to use every detail to our advantage."

"They have settled in well. The technical tunnels aren't much different from Zarkov's roots. My men are on their guard around your servants, but that seems to be the way for every community here. We've had a few scuffles with the locals, but so far it's just been bloody noses and a couple of broken legs."

"They're settling in well. The technical corridors aren't much different from Zarkov's roots. My soldiers are on their guard around your servants, but that seems to be the way for every community here. We've had a few scuffles with the locals, but so far it's just been bloody noses and a couple of broken legs."

languages.text: 「彼らはうまく定着しました、御{mf|裁判長|裁判官}。この空飛ぶ船は、我々の新しいザルコフです。そして我々は、この世界で生き残る方法を学んでいます。我々は、保守用のトンネルを探索し、様々な事故や乗船時の行動について尋ねています。次のステップは、あらゆる詳細を我々の利益のために利用する方法を学ぶことです」
languages.original_text: "They have settled in well, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The voidship is our new Zarkov. And we are learning how to survive in this world. We're exploring the maintenance tunnels, and asking about behaviour in various incidents and boarding. The next step is to learn how to use every detail to our advantage."

languages.text: "İyi yerleşiyorlar. Teknik koridorlar, Zarkov'un köklerinden pek farklı değil. Askerlerim sizin hizmetkârlarınızın etrafında tetikteler ama görünüşe göre buradaki her topluluğun yolu bu. Yerlilerle birkaç kez itişip kakıştık ama şu ana kadar sadece burun kanamaları ve birkaç kırık bacaktan ibaret."
languages.original_text: "They're settling in well. The technical corridors aren't much different from Zarkov's roots. My soldiers are on their guard around your servants, but that seems to be the way for every community here. We've had a few scuffles with the locals, but so far it's just been bloody noses and a couple of broken legs."

traits.locale_text: "İyi yerleşiyorlar. Teknik koridorlar, Zarkov'un köklerinden pek farklı değil. Askerlerim sizin hizmetkârlarınızın etrafında tetikteler ama görünüşe göre buradaki her topluluğun yolu bu. Yerlilerle birkaç kez itişip kakıştık ama şu ana kadar sadece burun kanamaları ve birkaç kırık bacaktan ibaret."

languages.text: “他们适应得不错。技术通道和扎尔科夫的根系没太大区别。我的士兵在您的仆从面前警觉得很，不过这里每个群体似乎都在互相提防。我们和老船员有过几次冲突，但目前也就是鼻子打出血、断上几条腿而已。”
languages.original_text: "They're settling in well. The technical corridors aren't much different from Zarkov's roots. My soldiers are on their guard around your servants, but that seems to be the way for every community here. We've had a few scuffles with the locals, but so far it's just been bloody noses and a couple of broken legs."

traits.locale_text: “他们适应得不错。技术通道和扎尔科夫的根系没太大区别。我的士兵在您的仆从面前警觉得很，不过这里每个群体似乎都在互相提防。我们和老船员有过几次冲突，但目前也就是鼻子打出血、断上几条腿而已。”

languages.text: "Sie leben sich gut ein. Die technischen Korridore sind nicht viel anders, als die Wurzeln auf Zarkov. Meine Soldaten sind in der Nähe Eurer Diener auf der Hut, aber so scheinen es hier alle zu halten. Es gab ein paar Reibereien mit den Einheimischen, aber bis jetzt ist bis auf blutige Nasen und einige gebrochene Beine nichts passiert."
languages.original_text: "They're settling in well. The technical corridors aren't much different from Zarkov's roots. My soldiers are on their guard around your servants, but that seems to be the way for every community here. We've had a few scuffles with the locals, but so far it's just been bloody noses and a couple of broken legs."

traits.locale_text: "Sie leben sich gut ein. Die technischen Korridore sind nicht viel anders, als die Wurzeln auf Zarkov. Meine Soldaten sind in der Nähe Eurer Diener auf der Hut, aber so scheinen es hier alle zu halten. Es gab ein paar Reibereien mit den Einheimischen, aber bis jetzt ist bis auf blutige Nasen und einige gebrochene Beine nichts passiert."

languages.text: « Ils se sont bien acclimatés. Les couloirs du vaisseau sont devenus notre nouveau Zarkov. Mes soldats se méfient de vos serviteurs, mais visiblement, nous ne sommes pas les seuls dans ce cas. Nous avons eu quelques... accrochages avec les autochtones, mais rien de bien méchant. Des nez et des jambes cassés, rien de plus. »
languages.original_text: "They're settling in well. The technical corridors aren't much different from Zarkov's roots. My soldiers are on their guard around your servants, but that seems to be the way for every community here. We've had a few scuffles with the locals, but so far it's just been bloody noses and a couple of broken legs."

traits.locale_text: « Ils se sont bien acclimatés. Les couloirs du vaisseau sont devenus notre nouveau Zarkov. Mes soldats se méfient de vos serviteurs, mais visiblement, nous ne sommes pas les seuls dans ce cas. Nous avons eu quelques... accrochages avec les autochtones, mais rien de bien méchant. Des nez et des jambes cassés, rien de plus. »

languages.text: «Se están adaptando bien. Los corredores de mantenimiento no son muy distintos a las raíces de Zarkov. Mis soldados mantienen la guardia alta frente a sus sirvientes, pero parece que aquí todas las comunidades hacen lo mismo. Hemos tenido algunos conflictos con los lugareños, pero no han pasado de unas narices ensangrentadas y un par de piernas rotas».
languages.original_text: "They're settling in well. The technical corridors aren't much different from Zarkov's roots. My soldiers are on their guard around your servants, but that seems to be the way for every community here. We've had a few scuffles with the locals, but so far it's just been bloody noses and a couple of broken legs."

Hemos tenido algunos conflictos con los lugareños, pero no han pasado de unas narices ensangrentadas y un par de piernas rotas».
